layout_note: Typed attachment grid (spreadsheet style): SP/DC/JT, Full Asset Name, Type of Transaction (Purchase/Sale/Sale (Partial)/Exchange), Date of Transaction MM/DD/YY, Capital Gain Greater than $200, Amount of Transaction columns A-K (A $1,001-$15,000; B $15,001-$50,000; C $50,001-$100,000; D $100,001-$250,000; E $250,001-$500,000; F $500,001-$1,000,000; G $1,000,001-$5,000,000; H $5,000,001-$25,000,000; I $25,000,001-$50,000,000; J Over $50,000,000; K Transaction in a Spouse or Dependent Child Asset over $1,000,000). Black band group header row 'The Declaration of Trust of Ritu Ahuja' spans the Type of Transaction block. Dates normalized MM/DD/YY -> MM/DD/YYYY. 'Sale (Partial)' recorded as 'Partial Sale'.
